title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions:
Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
